DataListSpec.Name: HFHI CRM Model Scores - Updated data List v2
DataListSpec.Description: Model scores with start and end dates for auditing and validation.
DataListSpec.Author: HFHCON-DEV\twillis

SPDataList.CreateProcedureSQL:
CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.USR_USP_DATALIST_HFHI_CRM_MODELSCORESFORCONSTITUENT_UPDATEv2 ( @CONSTITUENTID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER ) AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
DECLARE @DetailFormID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = 'F112C1DD-BEEA-477D-9D40-D849947AA1C9'; DECLARE @RecordTypeID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = 'D6970D46-883C-4EC0-A09A-6BEEC981B951';
----------------------------------------- -- ADMA ----------------------------------------- SELECT 'ADMA' AS MODELSCORETYPE, CAST(A.VALUE AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, M.ID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, 'ADMA Score' AS NAME, M.ID AS ID, @DetailFormID AS DETAILVIEWFORMID, @RecordTypeID AS RECORDTYPEIDS, A.ID AS ATTRIBUTEKEY FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTED1DBE44C8F734152BDED6C3723A96873 A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
----------------------------------------- -- SIMIO Mid-Level ----------------------------------------- SELECT 'SIMIO - Mid Level', CAST(A.VALUE AS NVARCHAR(50)), NULL, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, M.ID, 'SIMIO Mid-Level Propensity', M.ID, @DetailFormID, @RecordTypeID, A.ID FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE628D8C79C5354CDEBA04853FF4D1129C A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
----------------------------------------- -- SIMIO Net Worth ----------------------------------------- SELECT 'SIMIO - Net Worth', CAST(A.SIMIONETWORTHPROPENSITYCODEID AS NVARCHAR(50)), NULL, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, M.ID, 'SIMIO Net Worth Propensity', M.ID, @DetailFormID, @RecordTypeID, A.ID FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE992C22EE8AF24ABF8E6AEF796C9EFFBB A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
----------------------------------------- -- SIMIO Planned Giving ----------------------------------------- SELECT 'SIMIO - Planned Giving', CAST(A.VALUE AS NVARCHAR(50)), NULL, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, M.ID, 'SIMIO Planned Giving Propensity', M.ID, @DetailFormID, @RecordTypeID, A.ID FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTEC14E96658FC544E0933F4DF1FA74CA6B A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY M ON A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = M.ID WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC;
END
